LocalPackagez
setup.pyzk
            import setuptools
            setuptools.setup(name="local-pkg", version="2.0.1")
            c
LocalPackage.setUpN)
Build a set of files/directories, as described by the
    file_defs dictionary.  Each key/value pair in the dictionary is
    interpreted as a filename/contents pair.  If the contents value is a
    dictionary, a directory is created, and the dictionary interpreted
    as the files within it, recursively.
    For example:
    {"README.txt": "A README file",
     "foo": {
        "__init__.py": "",
        "bar": {
            "__init__.py": "",
        },
        "baz.py": "# Some code",
     }
    }
    r;
items
isinstance
dict
mkdirr5
bytes
open
write
DALS)
Z	file_defsr<
name
contentsZ	full_name
FileBuilderc
z'File system does not support non-ascii.)
test.support
ImportErrorZ
supportZ
FS_NONASCII
skip)
testr
unicode_filename
FileBuilder.unicode_filenamec
unittestZ
SkipTest)
reasonr
FileBuilder.skipN)
Dedent and left-strip)
textwrap
dedent

<module>
